verdict: A fundamentally well-timed chart with good structure, but severely dragged down by an excessively repetitive chorus section and a few awkward transitions after jumps.

issues.problem: The exact same four-note sequence (JUMP LR -> tap U -> tap D -> tap L) repeats 14 times consecutively. This creates a monotonous gameplay loop that lacks creative expression and physical variety.
The transition from an asymmetric LD jump directly into a fast 16th stream starting on U forces either an awkward body spin or an unnatural double-step.
